era: 1987-present (core: 1990-1996, 2009-present). E=8 -- ENGINE MAXIMUM. Beacon Hill, Seattle. Columbia Records.

layne_staley.vocal_style: Baritone-to-tenor; absolute vibrato/sustain control; Cantrell-Staley dissonant harmonics

discography.title: Sap
discography.label: Columbia
discography.note: Acoustic; Chris Cornell, Ann Wilson guests

discography.title: Dirt
discography.label: Columbia
discography.note: MASTERPIECE. E=8 justification. Most direct addiction document in grunge.

discography.title: Black Gives Way to Blue
discography.label: Virgin
discography.note: Reunion; William DuVall; title track tribute to Staley

theory_nodes.concept: ENGINE MAXIMUM E=8: The 245-247 corridor closes. Hendrix (E=8) + Hendrix early (E=7) + Alice in Chains (E=8) = the densest high-energy run in the engine. Three consecutive degrees at E=7 or E=8. Will not be matched.
theory_nodes.description: The 245-247 corridor as the engine's defining energy event.

theory_nodes.concept: Dirt (1992) as document: the only Big Four album that is autobiographical about the illness that would kill its primary vocalist. Layne Staley's heroin addiction encoded in lyrics before the mainstream understood. Not merely heavy -- a document of genuine human suffering.
theory_nodes.description: Dirt as autobiographical record of addiction.

theory_nodes.concept: Staley-Cantrell vocal harmonics: dissonant intervals (minor seconds, tritones, parallel minor thirds) as signature sound. Not conventional harmony -- something darker and stranger. The most distinctive vocal texture in grunge, unreplicated.
theory_nodes.description: Vocal harmony through dissonance as Alice in Chains signature.

theory_nodes.concept: Down-tuning as tone architecture: dropped D and D standard through Mesa Boogie creates the thick, warm, low-register heaviness of the Alice in Chains sound. Combined with mid-tempo riff architecture, produces weight over speed -- the grunge alternative to metal's speed focus.
theory_nodes.description: Down-tuning and amplification as sound design.

cross_references.relationship: E=8. The psychedelic era maximum. The corridor begins. Same energy ceiling, different era, different emotional territory.
E=7. Hard Rock. Capitol Hill. Modern Seattle women-led hard rock follows the grunge maximum.
Big Four peer. Eddie Vedder. Ten. Pearl Jam will enter the engine in future degrees.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=8 + E=7. Olympic National Park canyon roar. Resonant, enclosed, amplified by canyon walls. The canyon-deep guitar tones of Alice in Chains find their natural acoustic pair in a temperate rainforest canyon.

milestones: Dirt as most direct addiction document in grunge
